statement: A vaccination certificate should be able to be made a request for by organizers of events upon entry.
An exit from the European Union (EU) should be effected by the Netherlands.
During the upcoming New Year's Eve, decorative fireworks should be given permission to set off again.
An additional tax should be imposed on making a purchase of meat.
The abolition of the ban on face-covering clothing should be effected by the government.
The decision of where new residential areas are built should be made by the national government, rather than provinces and municipalities.
Reductions in the VAT on cultural activities should be made by the government to 5 percent.
The construction of a new nuclear power plant should be effected by The Netherlands.
The historical slave trade should be made an apology for by the Dutch government.
Earnings as much as secondary school teachers earn should be granted to primary school teachers.
The introduction of an additional flight tax for short-distance flights should be effected by the Netherlands.
The completion of integration should be effected by asylum seekers with a temporary residence permit before getting a rental home.
The government should give legal authorization to both the purchase and sale of soft drugs by coffee shops.
The acceptance of more refugees should be effected by the Netherlands than it currently does.
Measures should be taken by the state to effect the redistribution of wealth from the rich to the poor.
An increase in spending on public health care must be effected by the government, even if this means increasing taxes.
Relative authorities should give a reduction to the working day without reducing workers' wages.
The economy should be made as few interventions as possible by governments.
The government should raise taxes on fossil fuels to effect the financing of the Green Transition.
An increase in irrigated agricultural areas should be effected by the future Spanish government by means of large water transfers.
The recovery of more sovereignty must be effected by us to better defend Spain's interests in Europe.
The strengthening of NATO in Europe should be given a boost to by the Spanish government.
The best way to solve the conflict in Catalonia is for its citizens' future to be able to be casted a vote on by themselves in a referendum.
The weakening of the State is effected by negotiating with pro-independence supporters.
The Constitution must give recognition to the right to self-determination.
A threat to Spanish is posed by linguistic-immersion policies in the regional (native) language in bilingual Autonomous Communities.
The Law of Democratic Memory passed during this legislature be effected the repeal is necessary.
Immigrants own health services should be made payments for by themselves.
The government should grant permission to young people over the age of 16 to vote in Bundestag elections.
The law is to give stricter restrictions to the ability of landlords to increase housing rents more strictly.
An increase in German's defense spending is to be effected by Germany.
The government is to give a stronger boost to the traditional family of father, mother and children than other living arrangements.
Relative authorities should continue to give permission to donations from companies to political parties.
The government is to give permission to the Nord Stream 2 Baltic Sea pipeline, which transports gas from Russia to Germany, to go into operation as planned.
Headscarves are to be given permission to be worn by female civil servants while on duty.
More financial support is to be made provision for by the federal government for projects to combat anti-Semitism.
Contracts for the expansion of the communications infrastructure in Germany should not be given permission to receive by Chinese companies.
The collection of church tax for religious communities should continue to be effected by the state.
The government is to give general approval to the controlled sale of cannabis.
An exit from the European Union is to be effected by Germany.
The government should give permission to facial recognition software to be used for video surveillance in public places.
The government should give organic agriculture a stronger boost than conventional agriculture.
The state is to be able to give recognition to Islamic associations as religious communities.
The government is to give the statutory minimum wage an increase to at least 12 euros by 2022 at the latest.
The government is to give heavier taxation to air traffic.
The decision of whether to allow their employees to work from home is to be made by companies for themselves.
The government should give an increase to social transfers to reduce the effects of inflation on citizens.
Private visits to specialists should be given funding for by the state if the waiting time at a public facility exceeds three months.
Provision for a free nursery place should be made by the state for every child.
More freedom should be given to schools to make a choice of the content covered in the curriculum.
The construction of low-rent apartments should be effected by the state for rent.
The government should effect an increase in taxes for top earners.
The payment of same health premium should be made by all entrepreneurs regardless of income.
The adoption of the migrant relocation solutions adopted by the European Union should be effected by Poland.
The government should effect a further increase to the share of defense spending in Poland's GDP.
The government should give restrictions to public media funding from the state budget.
Relative authorities should give restrictions to the powers of the secret services to track the activities of citizens on the Internet.
Threats against Hungary's sovereignty is made by the EU's rule of law mechanism.
Only Hungarian economic interests should give guidance to Hungarian foreign policy.
The decision of whether to remain part of the EU should be made by Hungary by referendum.
The government should effect an increase in the age of compulsory schooling back to 18.
The government should effect an increase in education spending to at least the OECD average of 5.2 per cent (GDP).
Relative authorities should give teachers' salaries a twofold increase.
Changing the university model (reorganisation into a trust) has effected a reduction to political influence.
The government should only give permission to men and women to marry.
Targeted measures should be taken by the state to give a boost to equal participation of fathers and mothers in child-rearing.
The Istanbul Convention, which combats violence against women and domestic violence should be given ratification to by the Hungarian government.
The government should grant an extension of the current three-month unemployment benefit.
It is right that the school entry maturity of children over the age of six is made a decision on by the Education Office, rather than by parents and kindergarten teachers.
Hungary should give legal authorisation to the use of medical cannabis.
The government should impose heavier taxation on polluting companies.
In larger cities, the government should give restrictions to car traffic through various measures (P+R parking, construction of cycle paths, improvement of public transport).
The regaining of more autonomy should be effected by member states.
The government should give citizens a guarantee of freedom of choice in end-of-life matters (euthanasia).
The government should give permission to recreational use of marijuana/cannabis.
Relative authorities need to pass a law to effect the prevention of companies' relocating their production abroad.
Employees should be able to effect the dismissal of employees more easily by businesses.
The government should give a boost to the use of nuclear power plants for the purpose of producing energy.
The construction of more incinerators/thermal power plants should be effected by Italy.
The cessation of the sending arms and war material to the Ukrainian government should be effected by Italy.
More funding should be made an allocation of by the federal government for health insurance premium subsidies.
The government is to give a reduction to pensions (lowering the minimum conversion rate from 6.8% to 6%).
Relative authorities should effect an increase in paid parental leave beyond today's 14 weeks of maternity leave and two weeks of paternity leave.
More financial support for public housing construction should be made provision for by the federal government.
A greater contribution should be made to health care costs by insured persons (e.g., increase the minimum deductible).
The raising of the requirements for the high school should be effected by the federal government.
The authorities should give permission to more qualified workers from non-EU/EFTA countries to work in Switzerland (increase third-country quota).
The government should give legal authorization to cannabis use.
Relative authorities should be given permission to allow doctors to administer direct active euthanasia.
The government should impose separate taxation on married couples (individual taxation).
The authorities should make a further reduction in the differences between cantons with high and low financial capacity through fiscal equalization.
The choice of electricity supplier should be free to be made by private households (complete liberalization of the electricity market).
Switzerland should have the registration of new passenger cars with internal combustion engines banned by Switzerland starting in 2035.
It's fair that relative authorities are relaxing environmental and landscape protection rules to give permission for the development of renewable energy.
Relative authorities should give permission to the construction of new nuclear power plants again.
A comprehensive public service offering also in rural regions should be given a guarantee of by the state.
A popular initiative aims to make reductions in television and radio fees (CHF 200 per household, exemption for businesses) should be launched.
The government should give the voting age a reduction to 16.
The expansion of the Swiss Armed Forces' cooperation with NATO should be effected by the Swiss Armed Forces.

Relative authorities should allow the Federal Council to give authorization to other states to re-export Swiss weapons in cases of a war of aggression in violation of international law (e.g., the attack on Ukraine).
The termination of the Schengen agreement with the EU should be effected by Switzerland and the reintroduction of more security checks directly at the border should be effected.
The termination of the Bilateral Agreements with the EU should be effected by Switzerland and a free trade agreement without the free movement of persons should be sought.
A return to a strict interpretation of neutrality (renounce economic sanctions to a large extent) should be made by Switzerland.
